name: Puttanesca a La Andy's Colonial Tavern
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a nonreactive large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the minced garlic and stir until it turns pale gold, about 5 to 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the chopped tomatoes, capers, olives, dried red pepper flakes, basil, oregano, and black pepper.
4. Return the pan to medium-low heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Taste the sauce and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
6. Reduce the heat to very low.
7. Cook the spaghetti in plenty of well-salted boiling water until al dente; drain.
8. Toss the cooked spaghetti with the puttanesca sauce.
9. Sprinkle with fresh parsley and serve.
